MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2023 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Claims
Off Calendar Mar-02-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Emily D. Bergstrom; BHC Law Group LLP; 510-658-3600; appearing for defendants Dennis Louie, Donald Louie, Gim Louie and Henry Louie.
Allyson C. Murphy; Tobener Ravenscroft LLP; 415-504-2165; appearing for plaintiffs Daniel Gala, Colleen Rivecca and Suzanne Rivecca.

Defendants contest the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF CLAIMS is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b) - compare Notice of Motion and Separate Statement. Furthermore, multiple triable issues of fact exist, including, but not limited to 13, 21, 27, 28, 44 and 53.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Francine Dais, CSR #8855, production@imaginereporting.com, 619-888-0297. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Claims
Off Calendar Feb-16-2023 Continued To Mar-02-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANTS DENNIS LOUIE, DONALD LOUIE, GIM LOUIE AND HENRY LOUIE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF CLAIMS is continued to March 2, 2023 for the moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and reply no later than February 16, 2023 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. (opposition received).

Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
